assessment._description: Default assessment generated from these statistics.

types._description: Config types aka config schema definitions. When encapsulated in Typed Data, these would be called data types.

perExtension._description: @todo: if the first part of the type name (before the period) matches an extension, then that is the provider. Otherwise, "core" is the provider.

typesInUse._description: Config types actually used by config objects on this site.

perExtension._description: This is not possible to generate today because config type definitions are plugins without a provider…

objects._description: Concrete config objects: either simple configuration or config entities.
